title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Nexus Malls - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Nexus Malls - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Nexus Malls, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Sales Manager for our Pune operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Nexus Malls:
Nexus Malls is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nexus Malls!
